rationale.R1.5: The agent reorganized the section to improve clarity and flow, sharpened claims with specifics, and led with the strongest empirical result.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainty by acknowledging a potential contradiction in the original artifact and providing clarifying language.
rationale.RX.3: The agent adhered to the scope of the active set by focusing on the proposed TermBridge system and its results.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoided downstream harm by presenting accurate and reliable information, without introducing new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provided provenance and traceability by clearly explaining the training procedure and API surface exposed to the model.
